evidence.text: Personal and family history of breast and ovarian cancer meeting hereditary risk assessment criteria; two first-degree relatives affected.
Completed pre-test genetic counseling with a qualified genetics professional on record.
Laboratory record reviewed; first full sequence analysis of the BRCA1 and BRCA2 genes for this member confirmed.
Test ordered by physician managing the member's hereditary cancer risk assessment.
